subcodes.first_line: O Candle of Mount Sinai! Thy letter was received and from its contents the utmost joy and gladness were obtained [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای شمع حضرت سینا نامه شما رسید از مضمون سرور و حبور عظیم حاصل گردید زیرا
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @consolation and comfort, @growth of the Cause
